lead_state._metric_fields_unavailable: gap_m / closing_speed_ms / ttc_s are metric quantities a forward camera VLM cannot measure; the 48-clip pilot measured this model fabricating band edges on 48 % of clips. The coarse categorical state is sufficient to STRATIFY a metric and insufficient to compute headway or TTC.

language.caption: Ego vehicle on a rural road, maintaining speed and lane position while navigating a right curve with no other vehicles or obstacles present, indicating a routine driving scenario with clear conditions and a straightforward path ahead

coc_trace.observation: Ego vehicle on a rural road, maintaining speed and lane position while navigating a right curve with no other vehicles or obstacles present, indicating a routine driving scenario with clear conditions and a straightforward path ahead
coc_trace.justification: The ego vehicle is following the road's curvature without any need for adjustments due to other traffic or environmental factors, suggesting a smooth and predictable driving experience
coc_trace.decision: Continue to maintain the current speed and lane position while navigating the right curve, as there are no immediate obstacles or changes in traffic conditions requiring any deviation from the planned route
